creator: iron.udjin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #1)

libva-vdpau-driver built from ports use portmaster. I use experimental [1] driver (nvidia-drm.ko) which provides DRM interface for x11-wm/sway. Under X11 VDPAU libva driver works fine. Yes, I recompilled all libraries which use nvidia-driver.

If the problem definitelly in the nvidia-driver - let's close this bug report. But I think libva-vdpau-driver should handle such situations and do not crash with SIGFPE.

[1] https://github.com/amshafer/nvidia-driver
